title: The Mysterious Dr. Fu Manchu
writer: Sax Rohmer, Florence Ryerson, Lloyd Corrigan
actors: Warner Oland, Neil Hamilton, Jean Arthur
plot: During the Boxer Rebellion in China during the early 20th century, in which a Chinese secret society attacked all westerners and anyone who associated with them, Dr. Fu Manchu's wife and child are killed by foreigners. Enraged, he...
